name: context-fundamentals
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "understand context", "explain context windows", "design agent architecture", "debug context issues", "optimize context usage", or discusses context components, attention mechanics, progressive disclosure, or context budgeting. Provides foundational understanding of context engineering for AI agent systems.
capabilities: Explains context components and their roles in AI systems
Teaches attention mechanics and budget constraints
Offers context optimization and token estimation techniques
Includes Python utilities for context management
Demonstrates context validation and truncation patterns
author: ChakshuGautam
securitySummary: Educational documentation skill containing no executable code with security implications. All 111 static findings are false positives: markdown code block delimiters were misidentified as shell backticks, and MD5 was correctly used for content deduplication, not cryptographic purposes.
valueStatement: Understanding context windows and attention mechanics is crucial for building effective AI agents. This skill teaches you how to optimize context usage, manage token budgets, and design efficient agent architectures.
limitations: Educational content only - no active agent capabilities
Token estimation uses approximate 4 characters per token
Focused on Claude and Anthropic ecosystem patterns

useCases.title: Design Efficient Agent Architectures
useCases.description: Learn to structure context for optimal agent performance and cost-effectiveness

useCases.title: Debug Context-Related Issues
useCases.description: Identify and fix problems caused by poor context management in AI systems

useCases.title: Onboard to Context Engineering
useCases.description: Educate team members on context fundamentals for better AI project outcomes

promptTemplates.title: Context Architecture Review
promptTemplates.scenario: When designing a new agent system
promptTemplates.prompt: I am designing an AI agent that needs to handle [describe task]. How should I structure the context to ensure optimal performance while staying within token limits?

promptTemplates.title: Debug Context Issues
promptTemplates.prompt: My AI agent is giving inconsistent responses. How can I diagnose if this is a context-related problem and what strategies should I use to fix it?

promptTemplates.title: Optimize Token Usage
promptTemplates.prompt: My agent is running into context window limits. What are the best practices for reducing token usage while maintaining performance?

promptTemplates.title: Progressive Disclosure Design
promptTemplates.prompt: I need to build an agent that can handle complex tasks requiring multiple tools and documents. How do I implement progressive disclosure to manage context efficiently?

bestPractices: Treat context as a finite resource with diminishing returns beyond optimal length
Place critical information at attention-favored positions (beginning and end of context)
Use progressive disclosure to load information only when needed for the current task
antiPatterns: Pre-loading all possible information instead of just-in-time loading strategies
Ignoring context degradation hoping larger context windows will solve memory issues
Using vague high-level guidance that fails to give concrete behavioral signals to the agent

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with all AI platforms?
faq.answer: Concepts apply broadly but examples focus on Claude and Anthropic. Principles are universal for transformer-based models.

faq.question: What context limits should I design for?
faq.answer: Design for 70 to 80 percent of stated limits. Claude 3 models have 200K tokens but effective performance degrades beyond 150K.

faq.question: Can I integrate this with my existing agent framework?
faq.answer: Yes. Patterns are framework-agnostic. Adapt the ContextBuilder class to your specific needs and language.

faq.question: How does this skill handle sensitive data in context?
faq.answer: The skill focuses on context structure and optimization. Implement your own data handling policies for sensitive information.

faq.question: My agent still hits limits after optimization. What is next?
faq.answer: Consider advanced techniques like context compression, summarization, and selective retention for further optimization.

faq.question: How does this compare to other context management approaches?
faq.answer: This skill provides foundational understanding. Other skills in the collection build on these basics for specific use cases.
